mapper.insert: INSERT INTO form_field (template_id, field_name, field_label, field_type, input_type, required, default_value, validation_rules, sort_order, layout_config, tenant_id, field_label_i18n, options_i18n) VALUES (#{templateId}, #{fieldName}, #{fieldLabel}, #{fieldType}, #{inputType}, #{required}, #{defaultValue}, #{validationRules}, #{sortOrder}, #{layoutConfig}, #{tenantId}, #{fieldLabelI18n}, #{optionsI18n})

INSERT INTO form_field (template_id, field_name, field_label, field_type, input_type, required, default_value, validation_rules, sort_order, layout_config, tenant_id, field_label_i18n, options_i18n) VALUES
(#{item.templateId}, #{item.fieldName}, #{item.fieldLabel}, #{item.fieldType}, #{item.inputType}, #{item.required}, #{item.defaultValue}, #{item.validationRules}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.layoutConfig}, #{item.tenantId}, #{item.fieldLabelI18n}, #{item.optionsI18n})
mapper.select: SELECT id, template_id, field_name, field_label, field_type, input_type, required, default_value, validation_rules, sort_order, layout_config, tenant_id, field_label_i18n, options_i18n FROM form_field WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, template_id, field_name, field_label, field_type, input_type, required, default_value, validation_rules, sort_order, layout_config, tenant_id, field_label_i18n, options_i18n FROM form_field WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY sort_order

SELECT id, template_id, field_name, field_label, field_type, input_type, required, default_value, validation_rules, sort_order, layout_config, tenant_id, field_label_i18n, options_i18n FROM form_field WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND field_name = #{fieldName} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
